mapper.select: SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, WRITER, TO_CHAR(REGDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD WHERE MENU_ID = #{menu_id} ORDER BY IDX ASC
mapper.update: update Board set hit = hit + 1 where IDX = #{idx}
mapper.insert: insert into Board (IDX,MENU_ID,TITLE,CONTENT,WRITER) values ( (SELECT NVL( MAX(idx), 0) + 1 FROM Board), #{menu_id},#{title},#{content},#{writer})
mapper.update: update Board set title = #{title}, content = #{content} where IDX = #{idx}
